  "findings": [
    "Group lockbox misused, compromising the integrity of the lockout/tagout system",
    "Failure to ensure each authorized employee has exclusive control over their personal lock"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Verify the energy isolation status of all affected equipment",
    "Re-establish proper group lockout procedures in accordance with OSHA standards, ensuring each worker applies their personal lock to the group lockbox"
  ],
  "rationale": "The misuse of a group lockbox violates the core principle of Lockout/Tagout (LOTO), which requires that each authorized employee maintains exclusive control of their lockout device to prevent accidental re-energization while work is being performed.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(f)(3)"
  ]
}
